sections.Part I Item 1:
ITEM 1. Financial Statements


The condensed consolidated balance sheets and statements of operations for
the quarter are presented on an unaudited basis with comparative figures for
the prior-year period. Total revenue and operating income are summarized by
reportable segment in the accompanying notes.
sections.Part I Item 2:
ITEM 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations


Net sales increased during the quarter, driven primarily by growth in cloud
services and a favorable shift in product mix. Gross margin expanded relative
to the prior-year period as higher-margin services represented a larger share
of total revenue. Operating expenses grew modestly, reflecting continued
investment in research and development and in sales and marketing.


Liquidity remains strong. The Company generated positive operating cash flow
during the quarter and returned capital to shareholders through dividends and
share repurchases. Management believes existing cash and cash equivalents are
sufficient to meet anticipated operating requirements.
sections.Part I Item 3:
ITEM 3. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk


There have been no material changes in the Company's exposure to market risk
during the quarter from the exposures described in the most recent annual
report on Form 10-K.
sections.Part I Item 4:
ITEM 4. Controls and Procedures


The Company's disclosure controls and procedures were effective as of the end
of the period covered by this report, based on an evaluation conducted by
management under the supervision of the principal executive and financial
officers.



PART II — OTHER INFORMATION
sections.Part II Item 1:
ITEM 1. Legal Proceedings


The Company is subject to various legal proceedings and claims arising in the
ordinary course of business. Management does not expect the ultimate resolution
of these matters to have a material adverse effect on the financial statements.
sections.Part II Item 1A:
ITEM 1A. Risk Factors


There have been no material changes to the risk factors previously disclosed
in the Company's most recent annual report on Form 10-K, which should be read in
conjunction with this quarterly report.
sections.Part II Item 2:
ITEM 2. Unregistered Sales of Equity Securities and Use of Proceeds


During the quarter the Company repurchased shares of its common stock under a
publicly announced repurchase program. The repurchases were funded from
available cash and did not involve unregistered sales of equity securities.
